content.scenarioHint: 你和一位朋友在咖啡馆见面，今天是他的生日，你想第一时间表达祝福
expectedAnswers: Happy birthday! Hope you have an amazing day!
Wishing you the best birthday ever!
Happy birthday! Hope you’re celebrating in style!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确传达了生日祝福
语言准确性：语法和时态是否正确，无拼写错误
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者日常表达习惯
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'birthday' 和积极情感词（如 amazing, best, celebrate）

content.speakerText: Happy birthday! Hope you have a fantastic day!
content.speakerTextCn: 生日快乐！希望你今天过得精彩！
expectedAnswers: Thanks so much! That's so kind of you.
I really appreciate it! I'm going to enjoy every moment.
Wow, thank you! You're the best!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了祝福并表达了感激
语言准确性：使用了正确的时态和搭配
表达自然度：语气热情、符合日常对话节奏
关键词覆盖：使用了 thanks / appreciate / fantastic / kind 等关键词
